original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Ella, Sebastian, Lucas, and Ava. Ella was heard saying, "Ava is a knight". Sebastian was heard saying, "If Ava is a knight then Ava is a knave". Lucas was heard saying, "If Ella is a knight then Ava is a knave". Ava noted, "Lucas is a knave or Lucas is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
info_removed_type: "the number of inhabitants involved in the scenario"
